title: Kalshi Goes Live With America’s First Regulated Bitcoin Perpetual Futures
summary: Kalshi has launched the first regulated Bitcoin perpetual futures in the U.S., offering investors a new way to trade Bitcoin with leverage. This marks a significant milestone for regulated crypto derivatives in America.
body:
Kalshi, a regulated prediction market platform, has announced on X that Bitcoin perpetual futures are now live on its platform, offering U.S. investors rare access to regulated perps domestically. These contracts allow investors to trade Bitcoin with leverage without an expiration date, a feature previously unavailable in the regulated U.S. market.

The platform, known for its innovative approach to financial markets, has received regulatory approval to offer these products. Kalshi's Bitcoin perpetual futures are designed to provide traders with the flexibility of leveraged trading while adhering to U.S. financial regulations.

This development is significant for U.S. investors who have had limited access to regulated leveraged Bitcoin products. By offering perpetual futures, Kalshi enables traders to speculate on Bitcoin's price movements with the potential for higher returns, all within a compliant framework.

Investors interested in trading these new products should visit Kalshi's platform to understand the terms and conditions. As the market evolves, it will be important to monitor how these products perform and their impact on the broader crypto derivatives market.

These contracts let you trade Bitcoin with leverage while staying compliant with U.S. regulations. A rare opportunity for American investors.
